<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Commands; use Illuminate\Console\GeneratorCommand; class SolutionProviderMakeCommand extends GeneratorCommand { protected $name = 'ignition:make-solution-provider'; protected $description = 'Create a new custom Ignition solution provider class'; protected $type = 'Solution Provider'; protected function getStub(): string { return __DIR__.'/stubs/solution-provider.stub'; } protected function getDefaultNamespace($rootNamespace) { return "{$rootNamespace}\\SolutionProviders"; } }
